variables.font-sans: "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino Linotype", "Book Antiqua", "Songti SC", "STSong", serif
variables.app-background: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 10%, rgba(212, 176, 95, 0.18), transparent 18%), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 18%, rgba(78, 146, 120, 0.2), transparent 20%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% -4%, rgba(245, 236, 214, 0.12), transparent 28%), linear-gradient(180deg, #4a1217 0%, #220d13 42%, #12090d 100%)
variables.share-bg: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(214, 177, 93, 0.22), transparent 28%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(96, 34, 33, 0.98), rgba(45, 18, 19, 0.98))
variables.global-share-bg: radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(118, 180, 154, 0.18), transparent 30%), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(48, 86, 71, 0.98), rgba(26, 26, 21, 0.98))
